prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility patterns, UPS stock has historical daily volatility of approximately 1.5-2%. Over 6 trading days, this translates to potential moves of 3-5% in either direction. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum typical of established logistics companies. Confidence intervals are constructed using standard deviation estimates scaled by appropriate z-scores (0.67, 1.28, 1.64 for 50%, 80%, 90% respectively) and accounting for the square root of time scaling over 6 days.
